channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dispute Between Police and Truck Drivers Forum Over N3 Demonstration
item.description: The All Truck Drivers Forum and Allied South Africa (ATDF-SA) has denied involvement in violent disruptions along the N3 near Bergville, following a protest demanding that road freight jobs be reserve...

item.title: Dangote Refinery Lowers Petrol and Diesel Prices to Support Consumers
item.description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery & Petrochemicals don announce say dem don reduce the ex-depot prices of petrol (PMS) and diesel (AGO) again. As e be now, petrol don drop to N1,250 per litre from N1,275, wh...

item.title: Pennsylvania Prepares for Medicaid Work Requirements Amid Administrative and Coverage Concerns
item.description: Pennsylvania is preparing to implement new Medicaid work requirements that will take effect in January 2027 under a federal mandate. State officials say the changes will significantly increase adminis...

item.title: Lebanon urges ceasefire as Israeli strikes escalate in southern regions amid ongoing cross-border clashes
item.description: Lebanon’s Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has strongly criticised Israel’s military actions, accusing it of pursuing a “scorched-earth policy” in southern Lebanon as fresh airstrikes and evacuation warning...

item.title: Behind the scenes of the state visit to Japan: moments from the emperor’s pep talk to handling an unexpected lizard
item.description: This article recounts behind-the-scenes moments from a high-profile state visit to Japan, highlighting lighter, human moments amid official proceedings. It notes the emperor giving a pep talk to prepa...

item.title: Colorado GOP gubernatorial candidate declines to answer question about claims of past killings in interview
item.description: Victor Marx, the Republican frontrunner for Colorado governor, drew attention after refusing to answer a question about how many people he has killed during a televised interview with local news outle...

item.title: Boebert says election-denier Tina Peters should not access federal compensation fund
item.description: Congresswoman Lauren Boebert (R-CO) publicly stated her opposition to the idea of using federal funds intended to compensate those wronged by the government to benefit Tina Peters, a Colorado election...

item.title: Conservative activist criticizes Michele Bachmann over claim linking divine intervention to GOP midterm success
item.description: Former Republican congresswoman Michele Bachmann sparked controversy after asserting that God would ensure Republican victories in the upcoming midterm elections if former President Donald Trump conti...

item.title: Minhas five-wicket haul powers Pakistan to ODI victory over Australia as Peake debut is overshadowed
item.description: Pakistan produced a commanding performance in Rawalpindi to defeat Australia in an ODI dominated by debutant spinner Arafat Minhas and a dramatic Australian batting collapse. The match, initially fram...

item.title: Matt Corby Talks Vocal Challenges, Musical Influences and Memorable Gigs
item.description: Australian musician Matt Corby opens up about the highs and lows of his career, sharing candid insights into his life on and off stage. He reveals that one of his vocal folds is permanently dislocated...

item.title: Filipino talent Matty Juniosa achieves fourth place in Britain’s Got Talent finale
item.description: Filipino singer Matty Juniosa has made waves internationally by securing fourth place in the grand finale of Britain’s Got Talent. Known for his remarkable vocal abilities and captivating performances...

item.title: Bulls celebrate final Loftus game for Ruan Nortje and Kurt-Lee Arendse with emphatic win over Munster
item.description: The Bulls secured a dominant 45-14 victory over Munster at Loftus Versfeld, booking their place in the United Rugby Championship semi-finals against the Warriors in Glasgow on June 6. Bulls captain Ma...

item.title: Delta Central Youths to Benefit from Rigging and Scaffolding Skills Training
item.description: Senator Ede Dafinone for Delta Central join hands with Nigerian Content Development and Monitoring Board (NCDMB) don launch three-week skills training programme for youths. The training go focus on ri...

item.title: Strong Buyer Demand Continues in Canberra Despite Lower Auction Clearance Rates
item.description: Canberra's property market continues to attract solid buyer interest across a range of price points, although a mismatch between vendor and purchaser price expectations is limiting completed sales. Au...

item.title: Trump criticizes court ruling over Kennedy Center name removal and withdraws support for project
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump reacted strongly after a federal judge ordered his name removed from the Kennedy Center building and blocked a proposed temporary closure tied to renovation plans. I...

item.title: Hawaii Congressional Candidate Kirill Basin Charged After Allegedly Threatening County Employees With a Firearm
item.description: Kirill Basin, a Democratic candidate for Congress in Hawaii, was arrested and charged with Terroristic Threatening in the First Degree following an incident at a Maui County government building. Accor...

item.title: Wisconsin Democrats test socialist-style economic populism in a swing state
item.description: The article examines how democratic socialism and broader economic populism are becoming a bigger force in Wisconsin politics ahead of the 2026 midterms. It focuses on Francesca Hong, a progressive ca...

item.title: Oyo APC Leaders Officially Present Sharafadeen Alli and Senatorial Candidates to President Tinubu
item.description: Leaders of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Oyo State have formally introduced Sharafadeen Alli to President Bola Tinubu as the party’s governorship candidate, bringing an end to months of specu...

item.title: A Gospel Reflection on Living and Loving Through the Word
item.description: The article titled “A Word on the Word: A lesson on living and loving” is a faith-based reflection written by Fr. Raymund Benedict “RB” Hizon, SJ, published under ABS-CBN Lifestyle. It presents a spir...

item.title: Sonic Boom Over New England Likely Caused by Meteor
item.description: On Saturday afternoon, residents across Massachusetts and wider New England reported a loud boom that shook homes and sparked concern. Police departments received numerous calls about the mysterious s...
